Creates a Spinner UI window with a specified color and returns a pointer to it.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a function [`spinner_ui_window_get`](<#spinner_ui_window_get>) that creates a Spinner UI window on the heap with a specified color. The function takes a parameter `spinner_color` of type `GColor`, which defines the color of the spinner. The created window is managed such that it is automatically cleaned up when it is removed from the window stack. The function returns a pointer to the `Window` object, allowing further manipulation or display within the application. The file includes necessary dependencies for graphics types, color definitions, and window management from the application's library.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/graphics/gtypes.h`
- `applib/graphics/gcolor_definitions.h`
- `applib/ui/window_private.h`
- `applib/ui/window_stack.h`
